title: Warp Totem
description: Adds a warp totem, allowing you to teleport to a lodestone linked to the totem using a compass.
body:
Adds a warp totem, allowing you to teleport to a **lodestone** linked to the totem using a **compass**.

The totem uses **ender pearls** from a **pot** placed above the totem in order to work. It will consume an **ender pearl** on warp.

### NB: In 1.20.1 and older versions, the pots are replaced by barrels !


## Craft:
![Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c938831199b4f9bbce0ee55d23bf55a38a8a1529.png)

## States:

_Disabled: (not linked to a lodestone)_
![Disabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/601016a7b58c2c1aa39ff43687d148f2ff736049.png)

_Linked: (linked, but not yet ready to warp, or the lodestone is obstructed)_
![Linked](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4919c88900d15d1be733355771f66ceda91ab0f.png)

_Available: (ready to warp on interaction or redstone signal)_
![Available](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0e98527d731c186390fbbf169e01ec589e7ad45.png)

## Setup:

_Default:_
![Default setup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/684a59b75f81668c0cbd2ef1216a767e79d60577.png)

_Redstone example:_
![Redstone setup example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79b3df68356177d968d50ac0bc34f77b02608221.png)
